reviews.title: I'm not happy
reviews.body: You can open an account online but don't walk into Gosforth branch & expect it to happen without an appointment. Even though, the 2 customer service faced staff, had no customers in sight.Could've been done in a couple of minutes & after all, it's 2025.& not the dark ages.Their no can do attitude has left me wondering, where should I invest next

reviews.title: Newcastle Building Society – A £1.75 Comedy Showu ever want to experience what…
reviews.body: If you ever want to experience what banking would've felt like in 1066, look no further than Newcastle Building Society.All of this chaos — and I mean full-blown sitcom-level chaos — happened over £1.75.I asked them to reconcile an address issue on my account. They treated this request like I’d asked them to launch a rocket from Gosforth to the moon.Not only did nothing get fixed, but they somehow made the problem more confusing, which I didn’t think was physically possible.I requested a simple statement to clarify my £1.75 situation. Apparently that was too much.Even when I warned them that the next step could involve the finacial ombudsaman, they still couldn’t be bothered. I think the computers went for a lie-down.Their complaints department? Imagine a medieval castle surrounded by a moat, except instead of archers, it’s staffed by people whose only skill is selective reading.Letters to the Chief Executive must travel through some sort of complaint-deflecting forcefield because the important points never make it to the other side.And the best part?Someone once told me years ago:"Don’t waste your time with Newcastle Building Society. Their technology is from the Dark Ages and their customer service is worse."I thought that was an exaggeration.No. I can now confirm it’s a factual documentary.So yes — after weeks of hassle, confusion, and technological time travel, all over £1.75, I can proudly say:This is the most expensive £1.75 laugh I’ve ever had.

reviews.title: Matty has been amazing to have on hand…
reviews.body: Matty has been amazing to have on hand throughout mortgage application, answering any queries I’ve had and supporting me throughout the experience.

reviews.body: Newcastle Building staff always do everything in their power to help their customers

reviews.body: Professional staff with a pleasant attitude

reviews.title: Converted my ISA to an non-ISA
reviews.body: I am absolutely fuming at their incompetence. I opened an ISA with them in 2022, as confirmed by emails from them at the time. I have not gone to transfer my ISA to another provider and they have told me it is not an ISA. I've lost all the tax advantages from the last few years, and will be behind on the money in my ISA now for the rest of my life.

reviews.title: Explained everything I needed to know…
reviews.body: Explained everything I needed to know on investing.very worm welcome

reviews.title: Payments into Savings Accounts
reviews.body: Payments into Savings AccountsBefore opening a savings account with Newcastle Building Society, I would strongly recommend you ask whether there are any restrictions on how you pay into the account ie by cash, cheque or debit card. I am currently in dispute with the Society over cash payments I have made into their Six Monthly Account. They need to be more upfront with customers at the point of opening accounts to avoid potential injury to feelings. I am currently raising this with the Financial Services OmbudsmanA word to the wise: As expected, no-one from Newcastle Building Society (alias Beth) ever got back to me. Beware of false promises!

reviews.title: Top quality all round.
reviews.body: I love being able to go into a branch and discuss my needs with such friendly, welcoming, professional people. Their range of financial products is very good. Perfect 10.

reviews.title: quick efficient service
reviews.body: Reply from Newcastle Building Society

reviews.title: Excellent staff in Barnard castle…
reviews.body: Excellent staff in Barnard castle branch, nothing is a problem, they are all very helpful

reviews.title: This company has always been helpful
reviews.body: This company has always been helpful, whatever the problem may have been.  Changing my password was carried out quickly and simply.

reviews.title: Their online service is reliable
reviews.body: Their online service is good, and when we need to withdraw the money for any reason it is transferred quickly and reliably. We will definitely keep the account open.

reviews.title: Thiroughly explained the whole process
reviews.body: Newcastle Building Society are always, well mannered, polite, courteous, helpful and informative. They provide detailed explanations at every step of the process you are going through.

reviews.title: Whitley Bay Branch
reviews.body: The local branch was very convenient.  It was very helpful to be able to actually speak to a real person. The staff were all very accommodating, friendly and helpful.   There is a wide range of products available and the staff are able to take the time to discuss personal requirements.

reviews.title: My late father was introduced to the…
reviews.body: My late father was introduced to the Will Writing Company by this dreadful organisation. A working class man sold down the river to spivs offering unregulated services. It took two years and £4000 for me to sort out the mess that they got him into - no help, no support and certainly nothing to see here - not our fault. Shame on them. My father foolishly trusted them - I have utter contempt for this company.

reviews.title: Great service
reviews.body: Local, helpful, friendly and efficient staff served me in this small branch. When banks have closed in the villages, it is wonderful that a member-owned (mutual) building society is so strongly community-minded... demonstrating the ethos, and providing the  highest standard of service to customers. Thank you

reviews.title: A Credit to the North-East
reviews.body: The Newcastle  branch is well appointed and efficiently staffed by extremely courteous and efficient individuals.All-in-all a pleasure to do business there.

reviews.title: Extremely Helpful
reviews.body: Very well run Branch with helpful and friendly staff.Financial adviser service excellent and extremely helpful.  Sorted out a concern of mine, and would certainly use again.

reviews.title: Resent remortgage with Newcastle…
reviews.body: Resent remortgage with Newcastle Building Society, I dealt with Richard who was fantastic! I was traveling for 3 weeks with work and Richard adjusted his hours of work and we held the meeting on Teams. He really couldn’t have been more helpful.

reviews.title: Time to move on I think...
reviews.body: Received an email on Monday inviting me to open a loyalty saver account. I click on the link to open the account, and receive the message..."We cannot direct you to the requested web page at this time. Please try again". Email Customer services and told to wait 24 hours for the IT Department to activate. NOTHING, same error. What a complete waste of my time. So in September, I'll be moving on to another Building Society who can be bothered and transfer my savings to them instead.

reviews.title: One star is being generous
reviews.body: One star is being generous.  Just want rid of this BS but their administrative procedures are terrible.

reviews.title: Lovely atmosphere when you go in and…
reviews.body: Lovely atmosphere when you go in and staff so keen to help in a professional and friendly way . Also felt it part of local community with the info around the reception room.

reviews.title: Newcastle building  society new accounts Friendly and efficient service from all…
reviews.body: Friendly and efficient service from all the staff in Knaresborough branch.  It is lovely to be able to actually talk to a real person  .

reviews.title: I have wasted hours simply trying to…
reviews.body: I have wasted hours simply trying to revive an account they made dormant.  Same names at same address - should be easy enough.  The hoops they made me jump through are ridiculous.  I took driving license into their Carlisle branch and they wrote to me saying they photocopy was unclear.  THEIR OWN PHOTO COPY DONE BY THEIR OWN STAFF.  Several other stupid mistakes.  They are very hard work.

reviews.title: First rate experience at the Consett branch
reviews.body: Have been with Newcastle Building Society for a number of years and cannot speak too highly of the staff at the Consett branch.My business with them today was dealt with the usual friendliness and efficiency even though I had omitted to book an appointment.In these days of bank closures it is reassuring  to be able to have face to face discussions with friendly people who are genuinely interested in your financial needs.

reviews.title: Highly Recommended.
reviews.body: Always friendly, helpful and professional.  Time is taken with each customer to provide the appropriate servive.  Overall, an excellent service.

reviews.title: Patronising official
reviews.body: I received my first account information letter from Newcastle B/S; it contained an account number and a reference number. I became a bit confused about which was which and went to my local branch to enquire. I was greeted adequately, and when I asked if I could sit down, I received a curt yes. The official came over to me, standing above me like a praying mantis, and I explained the issue I was facing. I told her that the account number and the reference number were confusing for me. To cut a long story short, she spoke to me as if I were five years old; she was so patronising that the following day, I cancelled my account and returned the money to the original bank.

reviews.title: I had a problem which was sorted out…
reviews.body: I had a problem which was sorted out without any fuss.

reviews.title: This Building society cares about its…
reviews.body: This Building society cares about its members 👍

reviews.title: staff welcome
reviews.body: staff welcome. Clear explanations and speedy service

reviews.title: Respected my Wishes
reviews.body: I recently had a fixed rate ISA here but wanted to transfer it to another provider. It was made confusing by the fact the new provider refused to respect my wishes to only transfer when that ISA matured (like most do), so I got in touch with Newcastle to ask them to handle that and they did. This was really appreciated, and they transferred the ISA the day after it matured. Thank you

reviews.title: Mary - a brilliant professional.
reviews.body: Just had one of the best online support experiences from an extraordinarily patient professional called Mary.I am awful at online anything and have been avoiding the rigamarole of purchasing a new ISA, having not properly set up my online account when instructed to do so by mail. Mary very patiently took me through the process, at all times being good humoured and supportive, and got my online account properly set up and helped me with the purchasing of my ISA. Faultless. Brilliant support. Thanks

reviews.title: Excellent efficient and friendly…
reviews.body: Excellent efficient and friendly service.  Well run Branch and nice to have an alternative people business to online

reviews.title: A really helpful member of staff
reviews.body: A lady walking me slowly through the investment account maturity process which meant a lot. Heard every word clearly. A nice change.

reviews.title: Melanie at Newcastle Building Society
reviews.body: Melanie at Newcastle Building Society,  South Shields was friendly, informative and sorted our requests efficiently.

reviews.title: 2nd to none
reviews.body: I have been helped today i can not tell you how far this person went to see me right today 100 % Fantastic could not ask for any better so thank you Laura Moorhead 5* from me

reviews.body: Team at Alnwick very friendly and informative. Have full confidence. Make any transactions simple and they take place without issue. Good advice and explanations.

reviews.title: GREAT SERVICE AND PRODUCTS
reviews.body: Been a customer for over a decade and have always had very good service at both Darlington and Barnard Castle branches, staff are always polite, cheerful and helpful. Very competitive high street products. Online and phone services faultless too. Hope their high street presence continues. Never experienced any of the negative comments some others have left.

reviews.title: Exceptional service
reviews.body: Exceptional service - work done efficiently in friendly manner, as always. Additionally, staff member took genuine interest in my health, remembering that I had undergone chemotherapy, despite my not having been into the branch for over a year.

reviews.title: Jack an absolute superstar
reviews.body: Went into Northumberland Street Newcastle branch and arranged to see an advisor named Jack to discuss options around ISA . As someone with very little knowledge in this field I was abit nervous regards what I would be told . Well I should not of been . Jack was an absolute credit to the branch he explained everything to me told me what all my options were and made sure I knew exactly what he was explaining every step of the way . Thanks Jack you were excellent and wish you were one of my employees .Great work apart from the tea could have been abit stronger lol .

reviews.title: Great service with time for their customers
reviews.body: Staff are friendly, knowledgeable and keen to help their customers without rushing them. The personal attention and service received in the local branches is always appreciated and makes me feel valued as a customer.

reviews.title: Great professional advice very…
reviews.body: Great professional advice very professional and friendly service wouldn't look elsewhere

reviews.title: DO NOT USE THIS MORTGAGE COMPANY
reviews.body: Newcastle forced us into a position to pay £13000 early termination fee. My husband had a default on his credit report from years ago when he was at sea on a submarine he went to the company who removed the default as it wasn’t his fault but there’s we provided all this information to Newcastle who only offered us a 80% mortgage even though we have a 90% with them now. Said they wouldn’t consider for another 90 days just forcing us to pay £13000 it’s a scam and would not recommend at all. SCAM

reviews.title: Friendly and efficient staff in…
reviews.body: Friendly and efficient staff in Carlisle Branch.

reviews.title: Great Interest Rates
reviews.body: Good range of savings products with great interest rates clearly described - most with the option of applying online or in branch. App simple and straightforward to use.

reviews.title: Have been waiting for over 3 weeks to…
reviews.body: Have been waiting for over 3 weeks to receive the interest for a tax year for a closed account.  Tried 3 times, with little confidence that one will supply the information.

reviews.title: greeted upon arrival and offered…
reviews.body: greeted upon arrival and offered refreshments as we settled in a private comforted room. when I explained what I wanted to take place the response was calm and each question answered to my understanding. All paperwork was explained before any transaction took place. No pressure was imposed on me at any time

reviews.title: Excellent services at the Newcastle Building Society
reviews.body: I always find the Newcastle building society staff friendly and helpful

reviews.title: I would like to say thank you very much…
reviews.body: I would like to say thank you very much to Alex Baker for helping us this morning, he was very friendly and very patient. I would just like to let him know that we managed to do the transfer of funds to another account. He helped me to set this up. 5 stars to him. From 2 young pensioners.

reviews.title: excellent customer service
reviews.body: my phone calls were promptly answered and each call handler was friendly, helpful, polite and patient. i was talked through the opening of an online account and difficulties were kindly explained which resulted in the successful opening of an account. reassuring to have someone at the end of the line who has patience with a senior not au fait with online hurdles. 'old fashion' service at its best.  One negative I should mention is the unhelpful paper application form. The only option for making an initial deposit to open an account was a transfer from an existing Newcastle account! or a cheque. Last time I used a cheque was 2018! and the questions were ambiguous so it was difficult to know how to answer them. e.g. how much do you wish to deposit  (which you state) then further down page only option was a cheque or in house transfer as they do not accept a transfer from another building society where funds would come from.  Those funds had to be sent to my bank, then onward to Newcastle so only option was a nominal sum in the form of a cheque to open an account, then the full investment amount could be paid in directly from my bank!

reviews.title: Another excellent experience
reviews.body: Another excellent experience. The team are always polite, friendly and helpful. it is a pleasure to visit the Darlington branch. I wish other companies would emulate their customers relations

reviews.title: wellcoming experiance
reviews.body: Handled very well by the time-shared and servedworkforce

reviews.title: HELPFUL STAFF
reviews.body: Reply from Newcastle Building Society

reviews.title: Excellent service
reviews.body: The staff in Whitley Bay branch are  always friendly, helpful and very efficient. No queue, so I was attended to immediately, they always make me feel welcome which is such a change these days. Also it was nice to get a reply to my review a few days later.

reviews.title: Great people
reviews.body: Great people, professional and friendly. Good financial products.  Welcoming atmosphere. Customers feel valued.

reviews.title: Incompetent is being generous to them
reviews.body: Me and my fiancée are currently in the process of buying a house and made the unfortunate mistake of opening LISAs with Newcastle BS. As my fiancées account hadn’t been open for a year the government bonus was going to be clawed back, this was expected, however on completion day they refused to transfer the money to our solicitors, their reasoning it would take them an extra day to transfer due to the bonus being clawed back. Now to be clear Newcastle BS we’re aware of the transfer date 3 weeks ago, yet only decided on completion day that it would take them an extra day to transfer what is legally my fiancées money and not theirs, they can’t seem to explain why it takes them an extra day, and have so far even refused to confirm that the money will now be transferred on the next working day. This was after speaking to a representative who assured my fiancée that she would email her back today, to be clear they did not email. My fiancée said she would like to make a complaint and the representative said ‘what do you hope to achieve from complaining’ that just demonstrates the sheer arrogance and indeed ignorance of this organisation. I appreciate this may not be everyone’s experience, but they really do not take customer service seriously and at this stage are holding onto money that they are not authorised to.

reviews.title: Switching my mortgage to a new deal couldn't go easier
reviews.body: My mortgage deal was due to expire so I contacted the NBS Customer Service and asked for help in terms of switching to a new product that suits our needs. The advisor was very friendly and helpful, she drove us through the products by highlighting pros/cons so we were able to select the best deal for the next term.

reviews.title: Gave me easy to follow guidance to sort…
reviews.body: Gave me easy to follow guidance to sort out my problem. Polite, very helpful.

reviews.title: Service as normal
reviews.body: Reply from Newcastle Building Society

reviews.title: Online made easy …
reviews.body: I found setting up an online account easy due to the courteous and efficient staff members I spoke to.They took me through all the necessary steps in a professional manner.

reviews.title: Great expereance good bank
reviews.body: Reply from Newcastle Building Society

reviews.title: Excellent annual meeting
reviews.body: Our usual excellent annual meeting with an investment advisor and better savings account after.

reviews.title: Bereavement and Newcastle Building Society
reviews.body: Bereavement causes many problems including financial if accounts are joint but only your partner has generally taken control. With very little knowledge the online staff were able to give help sympathetically to help me take control of my building Society accounts without any problems. My greatest thanks to their team.

reviews.title: Archaic processes and slow service
reviews.body: Held a LISA until Sep 2023 when I switched providers. Recently requested copies of my LISA statements from NBS which I need as part of a house purchase. They are refusing to send me these via email, can’t reinstate access to my online account for me to download them and it’s been more than 2 weeks and I still haven’t received copies in the post. An absolutely archaic way of working, wouldn’t recommend that anybody chooses NBS in the 21st century.

reviews.title: Good service.
reviews.body: Local branch on my high street, good personal service, always show willing.

reviews.title: Very helpful visit from all staff today
reviews.body: Reply from Newcastle Building Society

reviews.title: Excellent service and prompt attention…
reviews.body: Excellent service and prompt attention as usual.
